## Version maintenance

Before a new version is committed, there is a set of maintenance tasks that are performed:

- Unnecessary files are removed
- Project versions are updated
- The solution is optimized
- XML documentation is updated
- The following files are updated:
    - ../CHANGELOG.md
    - AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_ARCHITECTURE.md
    - AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_API.md
    - AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_ROADMAP.md
    - AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_README.md
    - AppData/TaskLog/README.md

### Prompt

```text
Record all tasks in a new file named /AppData/TaskLog/MM-DD-YYYY_HH-MM.md

- Remove unnecessary files
- Verify the version numbers are 0.0.8 in all project files
- Optimize the solution
- Update all XML documentation
- Verify all XML documentation summary tabs are on a single line
- Update ../CHANGELOG.md file
- Update AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_ARCHITECTURE.md, detailing the solution architecture and framework
- Update AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_API.md, providing simplified solution API documentation
- Update AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_ROADMAP.md, detailing upcoming features and changes
- Update AppData/Doc/Generated/copilot_README.md, describing the Ubiquitous repository
- Update AppData/TaskLog/README.md
```

## Commit message

### Prompt

```text
Create a simple list of changes for this version that I can use as a commit message
```
